name: Wesfarmers Limited
analysis: WES's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$84.7500. Trade idea: entry A$85.7800, stop A$77.0517, target A$111.9649 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
